indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of any desk or table at sitting height is the primary barrier to setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: high-traffic public lobby layout
indicators.rationale: The high-traffic public layout makes it difficult to find a quiet spot for focused solo work.

indicators.name: ambient chandelier overhead lighting
indicators.rationale: Decorative ambient lighting provides no task illumination for screen work and may cause screen glare.

indicators.name: decorative plant arrangements
indicators.rationale: Decorative elements confirm this is a public reception space, not a work-focused environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is largely unsuitable for focused solo computer work. The lack of any desk or flat surface, combined with the high-traffic public layout and ambient-only lighting, makes it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The presence of decorative plant arrangements further suggests this is a public space rather than a dedicated workspace.
